target: data/sections.json: part2b.html — stratification paragraph, Self-Contradicted bucket clause. Replace the overclaiming "monitoring would expose the contradiction" phrasing with a categorically-honest version that acknowledges most of the 12 SC-unmonitored WINs are derivational/structural (not empirically monitor-exposable).
curmudgeon_hole_addressed: holes_found[5] (moderate, overclaim): "Monitoring would expose the contradiction" (applied to all 12 Self-Contradicted unmonitored WINs) overclaims for several entries that are mathematical/derivational rather than observational.
review_class_override_note: Class hint was verification but tracker routed deep-attack because the work required Opus judgment to categorize 12 WINs as derivational vs observational. Declaring deep-attack because the curmudgeon re-review must verify the per-WIN categorization, not just the wordsmithing. The textual change itself is small (one sentence) but the load-bearing analytical move is the 11/12 derivational classification.
old_string: {{CA_NONE_SC}} self-contradicted by the dome's own geometry ({{CA_NONE_SC_IDS}}) — monitoring would expose the contradiction.
new_string: {{CA_NONE_SC}} self-contradicted by the dome's own geometry or equations ({{CA_NONE_SC_IDS}}) — most of these contradictions are derivational (incompatible geometry, formula identity with standard physics, or missing mechanism) and visible from the dome's own derivation pages without live data; only the small empirical-prediction subset would actually be exposed by monitoring.
occurrence_check: 1 occurrence verified at clone HEAD; replacement is unambiguous

per_win_categorization.methodology: For each of the 12 Self-Contradicted monitoring=none WINs, classify the *contradiction itself* (not the underlying claim) as either (a) derivational/structural — visible from reading the dome's own pages without live measurement, or (b) observational — requires comparing dome prediction to fresh data. Derivational subsumes: geometric impossibility, formula identity with standard physics, missing mechanism, false dilemma framing, theological/linguistic etymology.

derivational_or_structural.basis: theological/linguistic etymology argument from Hebrew Job 37:18 and Deut 28:23. The contradiction is between figurative biblical language and the claim of a physical metallic dome. No measurement exposes a translation dispute.

derivational_or_structural.topic: Firmament Scaling Function from V12 geometry
derivational_or_structural.basis: Version-instability of an internal formula: V51 parameters reproduce published FSF outputs to ~3% but V50.6 parameters produce HAD 1.89 — a 28% discrepancy at a single station. The contradiction is between two derivations of the same quantity inside the dome's own version history; monitoring a real magnetic field doesn't adjudicate it.

Dome has no mechanism for generating redshift (no expansion, no Doppler, no gravitational well in dome geometry). The contradiction is structural absence-of-mechanism, not numeric mismatch. Hubble's Law itself is one of the best-measured relationships in cosmology — monitoring confirms the LAW but does not expose the missing-mechanism gap.

False-dilemma framing: dome claims ΛCDM cannot explain the Axis, so the dome wins. Even if true, this would not confirm the dome — alternative non-dome explanations remain. The contradiction is in the logical structure of the dome's argument, not in any measurement.

O1 (25.82 h) arises from the moon's declination cycle in the Doodson tidal expansion, which presupposes globe geometry. The dome appropriates the period without inheriting the framework that produces it. The contradiction is the framework-dependency, not the period value itself (which is correctly measured).

N2 (12.658 h) requires an elliptical lunar orbit with specific eccentricity — that is precisely what generates the amplitude-modulation sideband. Without an elliptical orbit, N2 has no source. The contradiction is between the dome's flat-disc lunar model and the orbital-mechanics prerequisite for N2 to exist at all.

Pure size-incompatibility: RAR operates at 1–100 kpc galaxy scales; dome maximum extent is 20,015 km. Ratio 10^12 to 10^14. Galaxies physically cannot fit inside the dome. No live measurement is needed to see this — the geometric impossibility is on the dome's own dimensions page.

Topological argument: dome aether routes through Axis Mundi → disc → Antarctic barrier → sub-terrestrial Sump, a closed ring with flux conservation Φ = B·A constant around the loop. The contradiction lives in the topology of the dome's own architecture. Magnetic field measurements exist, but the contradiction here is structural; the empirical mismatch (WIN-053's detail evidence) is a separate sibling argument.

Mass 2.13×10^15 M_sun cannot fit inside a 20,015 km disc — same size-incompatibility class as WIN-052. The contradiction is on the dome's dimensions page vs the cluster catalog mass; no fresh measurement adjudicates it.

Cepheid and SBF distance indicators rely on calibrated standard candles whose physics presupposes stellar populations at extragalactic distances incompatible with dome dimensions. Same structural absence-of-mechanism class as WIN-047.

Pure formula-identity: dome uses φ_sun(t) = 23.45° × sin(2π(t−81)/365) verbatim — that IS the globe axial-tilt formula. The contradiction is visible by reading two PDFs side by side. Solar elevation measurements confirm the formula but do not expose the borrowing.

observational.basis: This is the one genuinely empirical case in the cohort: Schumann resonance response to G3+ storms is well-documented in literature, but direction (enhancement vs suppression) varies across events. The dome's suppression claim could be tested against fresh Schumann+geomagnetic-storm data — monitoring would expose an empirical mismatch if the dome's direction prediction is systematically wrong.

per_win_categorization.summary: 11/12 derivational/structural, 1/12 empirically monitor-exposable. The current phrasing "monitoring would expose the contradiction" therefore overclaims for ~92% of the bucket. The replacement language captures "most contradictions are derivational; only a small subset is empirically monitor-exposable" without naming specific WIN-IDs (which would be brittle if a future review reclassifies one).

holes_addressed: Curmudgeon hole 6 (moderate): overclaim that monitoring would expose the SC contradictions for all 12 WINs

anticipated_objections.objection: A defender might say "derivational contradictions are weaker than empirical ones, so by reclassifying you're downgrading the strength of the SC bucket."
anticipated_objections.response: Derivational contradictions are not weaker — they are typically stronger and earlier-detectable than empirical ones, because they require no live data to expose. The reclassification removes a false claim about HOW the contradiction would be detected; the strength of the verdict (SC) is unchanged.

anticipated_objections.objection: A defender might say "WIN-053 (geomagnetic flux) is observational because B-field is measured at every INTERMAGNET station."
anticipated_objections.response: Magnetic field is measured, but the contradiction this WIN flags is the topological argument about closed-loop flux conservation in a ring-magnet architecture — that lives in the dome's own design, not in any single station's data. The empirical-side argument exists as a separate sibling within WIN-053's detail evidence, not as the load-bearing contradiction this prose paragraph indexes.

anticipated_objections.objection: A defender might say "the new phrasing is wordier and weakens the rhetorical punch."
anticipated_objections.response: The original was 6 words and false for 11/12 cases; the new phrasing is ~50 words and accurate. The rhetorical-vs-honest tradeoff favors honest — the entire stratification paragraph's credibility depends on each bucket-clause being defensible. Our review explicitly criticizes the dome for overclaiming; we cannot do the same in our own prose.

anticipated_objections.objection: A defender might say "naming WIN-061 specifically would be more informative than 'small empirical-prediction subset'."
anticipated_objections.response: The current count of empirically-exposable SC-unmonitored WINs is 1 (WIN-061). Naming a specific WIN-ID in the prose makes the section brittle to future reclassifications. The bucket clause already links {{CA_NONE_SC_IDS}}; a reader who wants the per-WIN basis can follow that link.

kernel_of_truth: The original "monitoring would expose the contradiction" framing had a real kernel: for genuinely observational SC entries (like WIN-061 Schumann), monitoring really would expose an empirical mismatch. The dome model also does include some monitor.py-style checks for OTHER cohorts (SC ∩ monitoring=hardcoded = 8 WINs including 002, 012, 029, 038, 045, 046, 049, 067 per curmudgeon stronger_arguments[1]), so "monitoring exposes contradictions" is a true claim within the dome's wider corpus. The overclaim is specifically that it applies to ALL 12 in the monitoring=none ∩ SC cell — for that cell the framing is empirically wrong for ~92%.
carry_over_notes_for_decider: Other 5 curmudgeon holes (1-5) on this review are NOT addressed by this EXP — they are build-side fixes (filter alignment + build_invariant assertion in build-scripts/generate-html.js). EXP-489 / ISS-2317 was scoped to hole 6 only per the routing-reason "Moderate overclaim correction." Holes 1-3 (critical/major arithmetic + assertion-missing) likely have separate ISS-IDs in the priority queue or open-issues; do not bundle this prose patch with the build-side fix.

Adjacent: curmudgeon hole 7 (moderate, kernel-of-truth challenge on closing sentence "the dome's monitoring avoids exactly the categories where testing would be most damaging") is a separate concern in the same paragraph. Not addressed by this EXP. May be a sibling ISS worth surfacing if not already routed.

The replacement string still uses {{CA_NONE_SC}} and {{CA_NONE_SC_IDS}} placeholders, so the build-side templating fix (holes 1-3) is independent — it will operate on the same placeholders regardless of whether this prose patch lands first or after.
summary_for_decider: Single-line prose patch to data/sections.json:part2b.html replacing the "monitoring would expose the contradiction" clause in the Self-Contradicted bucket of the §2b.1 stratification paragraph. Categorization analysis (11/12 derivational, 1/12 observational; WIN-061 Schumann is the lone empirical case) supports the new phrasing. Targeted string replacement, unambiguous (1 occurrence). Other holes in the parent review (filter alignment, build-side assertion) are separate ISS scope.
